name: the committed walkthrough decision package closes the implementation loop
command: ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[0])); abort unless d["loop_closed"]==true && (d.dig("next_steps","build_requirements")||[]).size>0' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/examples/dog-walker-marketplace/artifacts/07-decision-package.json" && echo loop-closed-with-build-reqs 1>&2
